_meta.description: Quotes for checkers game, grouped by game condition
_meta.usage: Select category by game condition, then pick a random index from the array

lose.author: T.S. Eliot

lose.quote: The gem cannot be polished without friction, nor a person perfected without trials.
lose.author: Chinese Proverb

lose.quote: A river cuts through rock not because of its power but because of its persistence.
lose.author: Unknown

lose.quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
lose.author: Nelson Mandela

lose.quote: Fall down seven times, get up eight.
lose.author: Japanese Proverb

lose.quote: He who has never failed somewhere has never tried something new.
lose.author: Herman Melville

lose.quote: Every adversity, every failure, every heartache carries with it the seed of an equal or greater benefit.
lose.author: Napoleon Hill

lose.quote: The road to success is dotted with many tempting parking spaces.
lose.author: Will Rogers

lose.quote: Good judgment comes from experience, and experience comes from bad judgment.
lose.author: Rita Mae Brown

lose.quote: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time.
lose.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

lose.quote: Even the darkest night will end and the sun will rise.
lose.author: Victor Hugo

lose.quote: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference.
lose.author: Roy T. Bennett

lose.quote: Hardship is the mother of all virtues.
lose.author: Unknown

lose.quote: Be not afraid of going slowly; be afraid only of standing still.
lose.author: Chinese Proverb

taunt.quote: Never interrupt your enemy when he is making a mistake.
taunt.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

taunt.quote: All warfare is based on deception.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: Appear weak when you are strong, and strong when you are weak.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: Attack him where he is unprepared, appear where you are not expected.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: To know your enemy, you must become your enemy.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: He who fears being conquered is sure of defeat.
taunt.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

taunt.quote: Lead me, follow me, or get out of my way.
taunt.author: George S. Patton

taunt.quote: If everyone is thinking alike, then somebody isn't thinking.
taunt.author: George S. Patton

taunt.quote: God fights on the side with the best artillery.
taunt.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

taunt.quote: It is better to be feared than loved, if you cannot be both.
taunt.author: Niccolò Machiavelli

taunt.quote: Divide and conquer.
taunt.author: Julius Caesar

taunt.quote: Cry havoc and let slip the dogs of war.
taunt.author: William Shakespeare

taunt.quote: You have enemies? Good. That means you've stood up for something.
taunt.author: Winston Churchill

taunt.quote: The object of war is not to die for your country but to make the other man die for his.
taunt.author: George S. Patton

taunt.quote: Men are moved by two levers only: fear and self-interest.
taunt.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

taunt.quote: He who wishes to be obeyed must know how to command.
taunt.author: Niccolò Machiavelli

taunt.quote: Aggression unopposed becomes a contagious disease.
taunt.author: Jimmy Carter

taunt.quote: Cowards die many times before their deaths; the valiant taste of death but once.
taunt.author: William Shakespeare

taunt.quote: He who is prudent and lies in wait will be victorious.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: Float like a butterfly, sting like a bee. You can't hit what your eyes don't see.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: I am the greatest, I'm a bad man, and I'm pretty!
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: It's hard to be humble when you're as great as I am.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: Not only do I knock 'em out, I pick the round.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: I'm the king of the world!
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: I've done handcuffed lightning and thrown thunder in jail. You know I'm bad.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: He's too ugly to be the world champ. The world champ should be pretty like me!
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: If you even dream of beating me, you'd better wake up and apologize.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: I'm not the greatest; I'm the double greatest.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: I am the astronaut of boxing. Joe Louis and Dempsey were just jet pilots. I'm in a world of my own.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: Silence is golden when you can't think of a good answer.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: Impossible is just a big word thrown around by small men.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: I'm so fast that last night I turned off the light switch and was in bed before the room was dark.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: I am America. I am the part you won't recognize. But get used to me.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: Chess is war over the board. The object is to crush the opponent's mind.
taunt.author: Bobby Fischer

taunt.quote: I like the moment when I break a man's ego.
taunt.author: Bobby Fischer

taunt.quote: I don't believe in psychology. I believe in good moves.
taunt.author: Bobby Fischer

taunt.quote: At the board he radiates danger, and even the strongest opponents freeze, like rabbits when they smell a panther.
taunt.author: on Bobby Fischer

taunt.quote: I'm just looking around to see who's gonna finish second.
taunt.author: Larry Bird

taunt.quote: If your opponent offers you a draw, try to work out why he thinks he's worse off.
taunt.author: Nigel Short

taunt.quote: Those who say they understand chess understand nothing.
taunt.author: Robert Hübner

taunt.quote: Men judge generally more by the eye than by the hand.
taunt.author: Niccolò Machiavelli

taunt.quote: The whole secret lies in confusing the enemy, so that he cannot fathom our real intent.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: Uneasy lies the head that wears a crown.
taunt.author: William Shakespeare

taunt.quote: Boldness be my friend.
taunt.author: William Shakespeare

taunt.quote: The fault, dear Brutus, is not in our stars, but in ourselves.
taunt.author: William Shakespeare

taunt.quote: In chess, just as in life, today's bliss may be tomorrow's poison.
taunt.author: Assaic

taunt.quote: The best defense is a good offense.
taunt.author: Proverb

taunt.quote: Attack is the secret of defense; defense is the planning of an attack.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: In war, the way is to avoid what is strong and strike at what is weak.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: If your enemy is secure at all points, be prepared for him.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: Speed is the essence of war. Take advantage of the enemy's unpreparedness.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: He controls the board who controls the center.
taunt.author: Chess Proverb

taunt.quote: Power tends to corrupt; absolute power corrupts absolutely.
taunt.author: Lord Acton

taunt.quote: He who controls the past controls the future.
taunt.author: George Orwell

taunt.quote: Power is not a means; it is an end.
taunt.author: George Orwell

taunt.quote: The ends justify the means.
taunt.author: Niccolò Machiavelli (attributed)

taunt.quote: Whosoever desires constant success must change his conduct with the times.
taunt.author: Niccolò Machiavelli

taunt.quote: Never give an order that can't be obeyed.
taunt.author: Douglas MacArthur

taunt.quote: Ability is nothing without opportunity.
taunt.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

taunt.quote: A leader is a dealer in hope.
taunt.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

taunt.quote: The strong man is the one who is able to intercept communication.
taunt.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

taunt.quote: To win without risk is to triumph without glory.
taunt.author: Pierre Corneille

taunt.quote: He who laughs last, laughs longest.
taunt.author: Proverb

taunt.quote: Keep your friends close and your enemies closer.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu (attributed)

taunt.quote: The measure of a man is what he does with power.
taunt.author: Plato

taunt.quote: War is cruelty. There is no use trying to reform it.
taunt.author: William T. Sherman

taunt.quote: One bad move nullifies forty good ones.
taunt.author: Israel Albert Horowitz

taunt.quote: To avoid losing a piece, many a person has lost the game.
taunt.author: Savielly Tartakower

taunt.quote: Chess isn't for the timid.
taunt.author: Irving Chernev

taunt.quote: In chess as in life, the king is most exposed when at the center.
taunt.author: Chess Proverb

taunt.quote: The pen is mightier than the sword.
taunt.author: Edward Bulwer-Lytton

taunt.quote: History is written by the victors.
taunt.author: Winston Churchill (attributed)

taunt.quote: Whoever desires peace, let him prepare for war.
taunt.author: Vegetius

taunt.quote: Fortune favors the bold.
taunt.author: Virgil

taunt.quote: I came, I saw, I conquered.
taunt.author: Julius Caesar

taunt.quote: The die is cast.
taunt.author: Julius Caesar

taunt.quote: He who does not risk, cannot win.
taunt.author: Catherine the Great

taunt.quote: I have more talent in my pinkie than my opponent has in his whole body.
taunt.author: John McEnroe

taunt.quote: Just remember, the mailman doesn't deliver on Sundays.
taunt.author: Scottie Pippen

taunt.quote: My style is impetuous, my defense is impregnable, and I'm just ferocious.
taunt.author: Mike Tyson

taunt.quote: Precision beats power and timing beats speed.
taunt.author: Conor McGregor

taunt.quote: Engage people with what they expect; it is what they are able to discern.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: It is fatal to enter any war without the will to win it.
taunt.author: Douglas MacArthur

taunt.quote: Never ascribe to malice that which is adequately explained by incompetence.
taunt.author: Hanlon's Razor

taunt.quote: In the game of thrones, you either win or you die.
taunt.author: George R.R. Martin

taunt.quote: Men make history, and not the other way around.
taunt.author: Harry S. Truman

taunt.quote: No man is worth his salt who is not ready at all times to risk his life.
taunt.author: Theodore Roosevelt

taunt.quote: It is not the size of the dog in the fight; it's the size of the fight in the dog.
taunt.author: Mark Twain

taunt.quote: All animals are equal, but some are more equal than others.
taunt.author: George Orwell

taunt.quote: You reach, I teach.
taunt.author: Basketball Proverb

taunt.quote: He who dares wins. He who hesitates loses.
taunt.author: British SAS Motto

taunt.quote: Fear of losing should never stop you from playing to win.
taunt.author: Garry Kasparov

taunt.quote: The greatest victories often come from the most unexpected moves.
taunt.author: Garry Kasparov

taunt.quote: A bold move, even if not perfect, can put your opponent on the defensive.
taunt.author: Garry Kasparov

taunt.quote: The pen is mightier than the sword, but the crown beats them both.
taunt.author: Unknown

taunt.quote: You can't just sit there and wait for people to give you that golden dream.
taunt.author: Muhammad Ali

taunt.quote: Only the dead have seen the end of war.
taunt.author: Plato (attributed)

taunt.quote: He who knows does not speak; he who speaks does not know. I speak because I already know.
taunt.author: Lao Tzu (adapted)

taunt.quote: Engage your enemy where he is unprepared; appear where you are not expected.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: The supreme excellence is to subdue the armies of your enemies without even having to fight them.
taunt.author: Sun Tzu

taunt.quote: Never let your opponent know your next move.
taunt.author: Unknown

taunt.quote: Do not pray for easy lives. Pray to be stronger men.
taunt.author: John F. Kennedy
